pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 17 features will fail to compile if the compiler is configured for Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the Maven compiler plugin to enforce Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit release configuration, the compiler might not strictly enforce API compatibility with Java 17, or might rely on deprecated source/target flags.
